description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights. This 5-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Das Hotel sieht von außen eigentlich ganz gut aus, aber die Sauberkeit und die Ausstattung lässt dann doch hier und da zu wünschen übrig. Ja, man zahlt nicht viel dafür, daher geht es meistens, aber wirklich zufrieden wird man hier auch nicht - ist wie andere typischen indonesischen Hotels stark in die Jahre gekommen. Aber die Angestellten wie immer super nett und jederzeit behilflich.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Acrum down hotel with bad quality rooms. No hanging racks. Toilet is dirty, broken pipes, broken door and bed smell.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: A run down hotel and with bad quality rooms. No hanging racks in the room, dirty toilet with broken pipes, broken door and bad smell. A terrible stay.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Very helpful customer service. They immediate me a new room when I made a complaint about the room.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Bisa cek in lebih awal karna sampai Aceh di pagi hari. Namun AC kurang dingin (harus disetel 16 atau 18). Ada bau aneh dari kamar mandi selalu tercium saat masuk kamar

comments.reviewComments: Very good price and good location

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
10 star service 

The hotel offers an excellent view and a truly amazing location. The staff are incredibly friendly, making me feel completely at home. The hospitality was outstanding — warm, genuine, and memorable. Truly a perfect stay and great value for money!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Lower price budget hotel with breakfast at city area. Easy access to food and shopping. Old hotel and clean room.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Area sekitarnya penuh dengan toko-toko otentik. Di malam hari, jika Anda berbelok ke kiri setelah meninggalkan hotel, Anda akan menemukan banyak warung makan lokal dan penjual durian.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
酒店干净整洁，员工非常友好，主动打招呼和提供服务，进门有工作人员帮忙拎包。前台温柔专业，房间干净整洁，毛巾柔软舒适，洗澡有热水，有牙刷牙膏提供。旁边有大型超市，有街边美食摊。特别推荐天台自助早餐，可以品尝当地风味美食，粥、面、主食、甜品和水果。顺便说一下，Hotel  Manager very handsome!

The hotel is clean and tidy, the staff is very friendly, take the initiative to greet and provide services, the door staff to help carry bags. The front desk is gentle and professional, the room is clean and tidy, the towel is soft and comfortable, the bath has hot water, toothbrush and toothpaste are provided. Next to a large supermarket, there are street food stalls. The rooftop breakfast buffet is especially recommended. You can enjoy local delicacies such as congee, noodles, staple foods, desserts and fruits. By the way, Hotel Manager very handsome!Highly recommend!
comments.reviewTitle: 性价比高，推荐。Cost-effective, highly recommended.!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Lokasi sangat strategis, dekat pusat belanja, membuat akses mudah untuk berbelanja. Namun, perlu perhatian pada fasilitas seperti Wi-Fi yang kurang memuaskan dan ukuran kamar yang terasa sempit. Kebersihan juga bisa ditingkatkan agar lebih nyaman. Meskipun ada beberapa kekurangan, staf di sini sangat ramah dan membantu, yang membuat pengalaman menginap menjadi lebih baik. Secara keseluruhan, tempat ini layak dipertimbangkan dengan beberapa catatan.
